profession_discipline: forge coordination and district craft oversight
public_reputation: Known around Cindervow Quarter through steady work as a forge liaison.
manner: Carries role-shaped habits that make local pressure visible in the way they speak and judge strangers. In Cindervow Quarter, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of a forge liaison in and around Cindervow Quarter, keeping ordinary obligations from turning into public disorder.
current_agenda: Keep Cindervow Quarter workable by absorbing local strain before it becomes a visible scandal, shutdown, or breach of order.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of forge liaison credible while managing pressure tied to status, access, logistics, and local reputation in Cindervow Quarter.

adventure_hooks.summary: Edrin Bannerhold can draw the party into a locality problem centered on forge master telan pyrehand duties in Cindervow Quarter.
Edrin Bannerhold becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with rebuilding backlog, house competition over visibility, structural heat stress around Cindervow Quarter.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Edrin Bannerhold is immediately readable as a forge master telan pyrehand tied to Cindervow Quarter.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Cindervow Quarter: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Edrin Bannerhold presents as someone shaped by the duties of a forge liaison and the daily pressures of Cindervow Quarter.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a forge liaison, and proof that strangers will not make Cindervow Quarter harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Edrin Bannerhold refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a forge master telan pyrehand too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Edrin Bannerhold adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Edrin Bannerhold always knows more about Cindervow Quarter than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a forge liaison in Cindervow Quarter.
